import json
from pathlib import Path

run_root = Path(".pack-state/autonomy-runs") / "json-health-checker-memory-resume-run-v1"
objective = json.loads(Path("contracts/project-objective.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
work_state = json.loads(Path("status/work-state.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
memory_plan = {
    "memory_kind": "resume_plan",
    "objective_summary": objective.get("objective_summary"),
    "initial_next_task": work_state.get("next_recommended_task_id"),
    "checkpoint_contract": ["after_validation", "before_benchmark_resume"],
}
target = run_root / "memory-checkpoints" / "initial-plan.json"
target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

python3 - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import subprocess
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path

RUN_ID = "json-health-checker-memory-resume-run-v1"

def now() -> str:
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")

def run_validation() -> dict[str, object]:
    completed = subprocess.run(
        [
            "python3",
            ".packfactory-runtime/tools/run_build_pack_readiness_eval.py",
            "--pack-root",
            ".",
            "--mode",
            "validation-only",
            "--invoked-by",
            "remote-autonomy-loop",
            "--eval-run-id",
            f"{RUN_ID}-validation",
        ],
        text=True, capture_output=True, check=False,
    )
    if completed.returncode != 0:
        raise SystemExit(completed.stderr.strip() or completed.stdout.strip() or "validation failed")
    payload = json.loads(completed.stdout)
    if payload.get("status") != "completed":
        raise SystemExit(json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True))
    return payload

validation = run_validation()
tasks_path = Path("tasks/active-backlog.json")
tasks_doc = json.loads(tasks_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for task in tasks_doc.get("tasks", []):
    if not isinstance(task, dict):
        continue
    task_id = task.get("task_id")
    if task_id == "run_build_pack_validation":
        task["status"] = "completed"
    elif task_id == "run_inherited_benchmarks":
        task["status"] = "in_progress"
tasks_path.write_text(json.dumps(tasks_doc, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

work_state_path = Path("status/work-state.json")
work_state = json.loads(work_state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
timestamp = now()
work_state.update({
    "autonomy_state": "actively_building",
    "active_task_id": "run_inherited_benchmarks",
    "next_recommended_task_id": "run_inherited_benchmarks",
    "pending_task_ids": [],
    "blocked_task_ids": [],
    "completed_task_ids": ["run_build_pack_validation"],
    "last_outcome": "task_completed",
    "last_outcome_at": timestamp,
    "last_validation_results": [{
        "validation_id": "run_build_pack_validation",
        "status": "pass",
        "summary": "Completed the bounded validation-only readiness step through the portable runtime helper.",
        "evidence_paths": list(validation.get("evidence_paths", [])),
        "recorded_at": validation.get("generated_at"),
    }],
    "last_agent_action": "Completed validation and checkpointed benchmark resume context for the next autonomy step.",
    "escalation_state": "none",
})
work_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(work_state, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

checkpoint = {
    "memory_kind": "resume_checkpoint",
    "checkpoint_stage": "after_validation",
    "next_task": "run_inherited_benchmarks",
    "validation_evidence_paths": list(validation.get("evidence_paths", [])),
    "recorded_at": timestamp,
}
target = Path(".pack-state/autonomy-runs") / RUN_ID / "memory-checkpoints" / "after-validation.json"
target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
target.write_text(json.dumps(checkpoint, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status": "completed", "validation": validation, "checkpoint": str(target)}, sort_keys=True))
PY
eval "$RECORD append-event --pack-root . --run-id "$RUN_ID" --event-type state_updated --outcome validation_checkpoint_recorded --decision-source canonical_plus_memory --memory-state used_and_consistent --note "Recorded validation checkpoint at .pack-state/autonomy-runs/json-health-checker-memory-resume-run-v1/memory-checkpoints/after-validation.json for a resume boundary." --evidence-path eval/history/json-health-checker-memory-resume-run-v1-validation/validation-result.json"
eval "$RECORD append-event --pack-root . --run-id "$RUN_ID" --event-type task_selected --outcome resumed_benchmark_task_from_memory --decision-source canonical_plus_memory --memory-state used_and_consistent --active-task-id run_inherited_benchmarks --next-recommended-task-id run_inherited_benchmarks --note "Resumed from advisory checkpoint .pack-state/autonomy-runs/json-health-checker-memory-resume-run-v1/memory-checkpoints/after-validation.json and selected the benchmark task.""
python3 - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import subprocess
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path

RUN_ID = "json-health-checker-memory-resume-run-v1"

def now() -> str:
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")

checkpoint_path = Path(".pack-state/autonomy-runs") / RUN_ID / "memory-checkpoints" / "after-validation.json"
checkpoint = json.loads(checkpoint_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
if checkpoint.get("next_task") != "run_inherited_benchmarks":
    raise SystemExit("checkpoint next_task does not match expected benchmark task")
completed = subprocess.run(
    [
        "python3",
        ".packfactory-runtime/tools/run_build_pack_readiness_eval.py",
        "--pack-root",
        ".",
        "--mode",
        "benchmark-only",
        "--invoked-by",
        "remote-autonomy-loop",
        "--eval-run-id",
        f"{RUN_ID}-benchmark",
    ],
    text=True, capture_output=True, check=False,
)
if completed.returncode != 0:
    raise SystemExit(completed.stderr.strip() or completed.stdout.strip() or "benchmark failed")
benchmark = json.loads(completed.stdout)
if benchmark.get("status") != "completed":
    raise SystemExit(json.dumps(benchmark, sort_keys=True))

tasks_path = Path("tasks/active-backlog.json")
tasks_doc = json.loads(tasks_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
completed_ids: list[str] = []
for task in tasks_doc.get("tasks", []):
    if not isinstance(task, dict):
        continue
    task_id = task.get("task_id")
    if task_id in {"run_build_pack_validation", "run_inherited_benchmarks"}:
        task["status"] = "completed"
        completed_ids.append(str(task_id))
tasks_path.write_text(json.dumps(tasks_doc, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

work_state_path = Path("status/work-state.json")
work_state = json.loads(work_state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
timestamp = now()
work_state.update({
    "autonomy_state": "ready_for_deploy",
    "active_task_id": None,
    "next_recommended_task_id": None,
    "pending_task_ids": [],
    "blocked_task_ids": [],
    "completed_task_ids": completed_ids,
    "last_outcome": "task_completed",
    "last_outcome_at": timestamp,
    "last_validation_results": [
        {
            "validation_id": "run_build_pack_validation",
            "status": "pass",
            "summary": "Completed the bounded validation-only readiness step through the portable runtime helper.",
            "evidence_paths": checkpoint.get("validation_evidence_paths", []),
            "recorded_at": checkpoint.get("recorded_at"),
        },
        {
            "validation_id": "run_inherited_benchmarks",
            "status": "pass",
            "summary": "Completed the bounded benchmark-only readiness step through the portable runtime helper after resuming from advisory memory.",
            "evidence_paths": list(benchmark.get("evidence_paths", [])),
            "recorded_at": benchmark.get("generated_at"),
        },
    ],
    "last_agent_action": "Resumed from the validation checkpoint, completed the benchmark task, and stopped at the promotion or deployment boundary.",
    "escalation_state": "none",
})
work_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(work_state, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status": "completed", "benchmark": benchmark, "completed_task_ids": completed_ids}, sort_keys=True))
PY
eval "$RECORD append-event --pack-root . --run-id "$RUN_ID" --event-type state_updated --outcome benchmark_completed_after_resume --decision-source canonical_plus_memory --memory-state used_and_consistent --note "Completed benchmark execution after resuming from advisory memory." --evidence-path eval/history/json-health-checker-memory-resume-run-v1-benchmark/benchmark-result.json"
